standard.label: AlloFlow Praxis ESOL 5362 learning-library QA v1
standard.meaning: A pass confirms complete learning and applied-workshop inventories, substantive lessons and checks, authoritative references, stable links, and explicit format and decision boundaries.
standard.limitation: This is not ETS, TESOL, WIDA, NCELA, or U.S. Department of Education approval, official audio delivery or scoring, a scaled score, pass prediction, licensure decision, language-proficiency decision, disability decision, or independent subject-matter, family, accessibility, linguistic, civil-rights, or psychometric validation.
